title: Vegan Turkish Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic vegan pilaf dish inspired by Turkish cuisine. This recipe combines garlicky goodness with the chewy texture of vegan ingredients.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add garlicky and sauté for another 2 minutes.
Add chewy and 2 cups of water to the pan.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
